summary: Tested the passed stock fix for inspection rejection crate equivalents. All 10 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified - stage cards correctly display passed count after inspection with rejections, and move form shows correct available quantity from previous stage's passed count.
seed_data_creation: Created test batches TEST-FIX-* for testing various edge cases. Batches are in 'in_qc' status with inspection data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Passed stock fix verified. Key change in /app/backend/routes/production_qc.py lines 558-563: rejected_crate_equiv = total_rej_bottles // bottles_per_crate, passed_crates = max(total_crates_inspected - rejected_crate_equiv, 0). Frontend correctly displays passed count in stage cards and move form shows correct available quantity from prev_stage.passed.

backend_api_tests: test_02_edge_case_zero_rejections - PASSED (0 rejections → all 10 crates pass)
test_03_edge_case_rejected_less_than_one_crate - PASSED (5 bottles < 24 BPC → 0 crate deduction, 10 pass)
frontend_ui_tests: Stage cards display correct balance values - PASSED
QC Stage 1 shows Passed=9 after 24 bottles rejected from 10 crates - PASSED
Move form shows 'Move from QC Stage 1 (9 available)' - PASSED
Move form input placeholder shows 'Max 9' - PASSED
Rejection Summary section displays correctly - PASSED
Total Rejected metric shows 24 bottles - PASSED

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: When stock moves from one stage to another, rejected stock was also moving (count was wrong). Previously passed = inspected_crates (all inspected crates passed regardless of rejections).
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: record_inspection function now converts rejected bottles to crate equivalents using floor division (rejected_bottles // bottles_per_crate) and subtracts from passed crates.

api_endpoints_verified.POST /api/production/batches/{batch_id}/: Correctly uses prev_stage.passed for available quantity validation
